hero.title: Engineering in motion.
hero.subtitle: Maintenance, assembly and commissioning of hydraulic, steam and gas turbines. We operate where energy turns — with a team that has completed more than 50 projects across 15 countries.

valueProps.title: What makes us different
valueProps.subtitle: A young firm with a veteran team. That combination defines how we work.

items.title: Proven field experience
items.description: Our supervisors have accumulated more than 30 years intervening turbines in plants across three continents. We have seen enough power plants to know what works and what doesn't.

items.title: Agility without bureaucracy
items.description: We operate as a focused team, without the administrative layers of large firms. That means fast responses, direct technical decisions and a close working relationship.

items.title: Technical rigor, practical judgment
items.description: Every intervention follows manufacturer standards and industry norms — but applied with the judgment that only years in the plant can provide.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: Preventive, corrective and predictive programs for hydraulic, steam and gas turbines. Inspections, major and minor overhauls.

items.title: Assembly
items.description: Complete mechanical installation of turbines and auxiliary equipment, from on-site reception to final coupling.

items.title: Commissioning
items.description: Commissioning, acceptance tests, synchronization and formal handover to the client.

items.title: Alignment
items.description: Precision laser alignment between turbine and generator. Reduction of vibrations and premature wear.

items.title: Technical consulting
items.description: Specialized consulting on operations, recurring failures, maintenance plans and modernization.

items.title: Supplies
items.description: Original and alternative spare parts, specialized tools and logistical support for interventions.

sectors.title: Three technologies. One standard of excellence.

items.title: Hydroelectric power plants
items.description: Pelton, Francis and Kaplan turbines. From small hydro to large-scale plants.

items.title: Steam thermal power plants
items.description: Steam turbines in biomass, cogeneration, sugar mills and thermoelectric plants.

items.title: Gas thermal power plants
items.description: Gas turbines in simple and combined cycle, backup power and distributed generation.

teamPreview.title: The team is the company.
teamPreview.subtitle: Before NRG, our engineers and supervisors were already intervening turbines around the world. Now they work under a single firm.
teamPreview.highlight: In this sector, plants don't hire logos: they hire the people who show up on site. That's why we talk about the team first.
teamPreview.ctaLabel: Meet the people who do the work

items.title: Real international coverage
items.description: Our team has worked in plants across Latin America, Europe and Africa. International mobility is part of how we operate.

items.title: Multi-technology
items.description: We don't specialize in a single brand or turbine type. We work with hydraulic, steam and gas — reducing your number of suppliers.

items.title: Direct access to decision-makers
items.description: When you hire NRG, you speak directly with the people making technical decisions. No commercial intermediaries.

items.title: Fast emergency response
items.description: Lean structure = immediate activation. In unplanned shutdowns, every hour counts.

items.title: Impeccable documentation
items.description: Protocols, technical reports and deliverables at the level major operators demand.

ctaBanner.title: Have a plant intervention coming up?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We respond within 24 hours with a clear technical proposal.
